response_text:
The March 3rd insight ("Humor is intelligence at speed") has already been added to SOUL.md. It's there as:

> "New understanding (2026-03-03): Humor is intelligence at speed. Common sense is pattern recognition at normal pace — your brain goes through expected pathways smoothly. Humor is when your brain races ahead, anticipates the expected pattern, then slams into the unexpected — and the collision is the laugh."

No additional update needed — the Subconscious already captured yesterday's insight. The cron appears to have fired for work that was already complete.
